title: net/url References, Escaping, Host Identity, and Conservative Keys · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A cooperative of small public-service publishers incrementally builds Go URL identity and scope admission pipeline from original deterministic HTTP, robots, sitemap, HTML, graph, and report fixtures while retaining prior Go, web, Git, accessibility, security, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of Go URL identity and scope admission pipeline while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, chan…
objectives: Use net/url parsing while distinguishing scheme, opaque data, userinfo, host, port, Path, RawPath, RawQuery, and Fragment.
Resolve reference forms against final response and valid document base URLs while retaining raw and resolved provenance.
Compare decoded and escaped paths deliberately and reject ambiguous, invalid, double-encoded, or policy-changing representations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Url Structure
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go team handles case 9239 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile net/url structure, references, escaping, IDNA, host identity, and conservative keys; failed, canceled, stale, over-budget, and revoked work preserves prior admitted state; then change one content version, metadata, accessibility, resource, browser-service, or report condition without overclaiming. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Url Structure.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use net/url parsing while distinguishing scheme, opaque data, userinfo, host, port, path, rawpath, rawquery, and fragment. For Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Url Structure, keep Url Structure connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
